2659d123-81f7-461a-818d-e014f7c8e8b2.content: What percentage of households have broadband internet in Seattle?
Approximately **91.58%** of households in Seattle (using King County as a proxy) have broadband internet access according to the 2019 ACS data.

85a55bd6-6cd2-45a6-9843-ef806af4e5db.content: How many women live in california?
According to the 2019 ACS data, there are approximately 19,757,199 women living in California.

The total number of men living in California is approximately 19,526,298 according to the 2019 ACS data. 

Note: This data is for the year 2019.
How many people have internet in sEATTLE?

Approximately 807,801 households in King County, Washington (which includes Seattle) have internet access according to the 2019 ACS data.

Note: This data is for the year 2019.
